milestone: Continuous Builder — Scene Stack + Experience Library tabs, full-height right panel
slice: Two changes, Builder-workspace-only. (1) The right-side authoring panel (Context Inspector + Experiences) now runs the full Workspace height, uninterrupted by the Scene filmstrip -- the filmstrip moved from a full-width flex sibling beneath the whole 3-column grid into a grid item of its own inside .wb-workspace-body's new second row; Inspector/Experiences span both rows via grid-template-areas, so only Working View's row shares space with the filmstrip. Default filmstrip height reduced 220px -> 128px, the minimum practical size for Scene thumbnails. (2) The Experiences column's "This Scene"/"All Experiences" toggle becomes "Scene Stack" (default) / "Experience Library" tabs -- Scene Stack renders directly from ProjectModel.sceneStack, walking Holders and Layers together in one ordered list, a Holder's attached Frame Experience shown nested and read-only beneath it, reorderable via moveInStack(...,'holder',...) for the first time from any UI. Found and fixed a real bug while verifying: the new reorder buttons' forward/backward edge-disabling was inverted (Bring Forward disabled at index 0 instead of the last index). Verified end-to-end via Playwright including actual Holder-vs-Layer reordering, independent panel scrolling, resize/collapse/Reset Workspace Layout, and View Mode disabling every new control.
